content.claim: Act CXC of 2011 on National Public Education establishes the statutory framework for 6- and 8-year gimnázium tracks, allowing upper-secondary schools to offer programmes covering grades 5–12 or 7–12 with selection at ages 10–11 or 12–13 respectively.
content.context: Fresh live research through the Legal and governance lens
limitations: The Act does not explicitly justify or evaluate the educational outcomes of selective tracks
No information provided on how frequently or recently the statute has been amended
The legislative intent regarding early selection versus later secondary transfer is not documented in the notes
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
